title: Better PvP
description: A collection of mods and resourcepacks to help improve your PvP skills and make the overall PvP experience much better!
body:
A collection of mods and resourcepacks to help improve your PvP skills and make the overall PvP experience much better!

This modpack currently does not support many versions, as I am still working on adding support for more versions.


**Dependencies:**
- Fabric Loader
- Fabric API
- ukulib
- Simply Optimized (optional, but very much recommended)

**Mods:**
- [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin)
- [Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify)
- [Freelook](https://modrinth.com/mod/freelook)
- [Status Effect Timer](https://modrinth.com/mod/statuseffecttimer)
- [uku's Armor HUD](https://modrinth.com/mod/ukus-armor-hud)
- [TotemCounter](https://modrinth.com/mod/totemcounter)
- [Tier Tagger](https://modrinth.com/mod/tiertagger)
- [ukulib](https://modrinth.com/mod/ukulib)
- [Marlow's Crystal Optimizer](https://modrinth.com/mod/marlow-crystal-optimizer)
- [Crosshair Addons Public](https://modrinth.com/mod/crosshair-addons-public)
- [Shield Fixes](https://modrinth.com/mod/complete-shield-fixes)
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
- [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin)
- [WalksyLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/walksylib)

**Resource Packs:**
- Default Dark Mode
- Fullbright UB
- Low Fire
- Side Shield
- Low Shield
- No Explosion Particles
- No Hit Particles
- No Explosion Sounds
- Small Totem Pop Animation
